leadText: The Insular Sea (Japanese: 離れ島海域 Outlying Islands Sea) is a part of the Isle of Armor in the Galar region. It connects to the Honeycalm Sea in the east and the Stepping-Stone Sea in the south.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games TR62 ( Dragon Pulse ) By the tree on the largest island Sw Sh Hidden items [ edit | edit source ] Unless otherwise stated, hidden items in the Isle of Armor regenerate every day. In many of these cases, they can also regenerate as different items. Every item that regenerates every day can also rarely regenerate as a Wishing Piece (at approximately a 1% chance). Item Location Games Stardust On the shore of the big island, closest the Tower of Waters Sw Sh Dragon Scale Rare Candy Dive Ball On the big island, on the furtherest shore from the Tower of Waters Sw Sh Stardust Dragon Scale Rare Candy Calm Mint On the big island, between the den and the shore Sw Sh Gentle Mint Careful Mint Sassy Mint Serious Mint Energy Powder Honey Timid Mint On the big island, between the den and the Berry tree Sw Sh Hasty Mint Jolly Mint Naive Mint Serious Mint Energy Powder Honey Modest Mint On the big island, in some red flowers between the trees Sw Sh Mild Mint Rash Mint Quiet Mint Serious Mint Energy Powder Honey Bold Mint On the big island, in some foliage between the previous item and the Berry tree Sw Sh Impish Mint Lax Mint Relaxed Mint Serious Mint Energy Powder Honey Lonely Mint On the big island, next to the tree in the flowers Sw Sh Adamant Mint Naughty Mint Brave Mint Serious Mint Energy Powder Honey Galarica Twig Next to the same tree Sw Sh Berry tree [ edit | edit source ] Shaking a Berry tree can yield Berries, but a Pokémon may be shaken loose instead and steal some of the Berries after a battle. As with every Berry tree on the Isle of Armor only accessible with the Rotom Bike 's Water Mode, the Berry tree in Insular Sea only gives out one of the friendship-raising Berries . On the big island, on the beach closest to the Tower of Waters Item Location Games Pomeg Berry Falls from the Berry tree Sw Sh
